Current challenge
Global Supabase leaderboard: lowest milliseconds rank highest except Tracking and Memory where higher score wins, PASS and FAILED completed runs can qualify, and each name appears once per challenge. Passing score qualified.

Press Enter to post. Press Esc to skip. Passing and failed completed runs can qualify; failed runs are marked. For Tracking, highest on-target seconds wins.
